EmailTemplate.description: 行程信息变更 就通知创建人 给他看变更后的变更字段 - 短信
EmailTemplate.name: Exhibition Arrangement Change SMS
EmailTemplate.subject: notification
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
您好，
we have received your Airport shuttle&Expo shuttle&Hotel request, you can login system to get new update
If you have any questions, do not hesitate to reach out to us via email at wangfang19@hisense.com
